Tests division of 2 by Number.MIN_VALUE resulting in Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion statement that tests a specific behavior of JavaScript's number handling. It checks if dividing the number 2 by `Number.MIN_VALUE` results in `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY`. This test verifies the behavior of the JavaScript engine when handling very small numbers and their division, ensuring that the result aligns with the expected mathematical outcome of dividing by a very small positive number. The code is narrow in functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of numerical operations in JavaScript.
